z3.reason: Formal proof that Tr(D[L](rho))=0 for arbitrary rho

sympy.reason: Symbolic dissipator computation and trace proof

superop_commutativity_Dz_Dx.note: D[sz] and D[sx] commute as superoperators

sigma_x.D_rho: Matrix([[-a + d, -b + c], [b - c, a - d]])

sigma_y.D_rho: Matrix([[-a + d, -b - c], [-b - c, a - d]])

bad_trace_rho_sigma_x.note: D[L] is trace-preserving even for unnormalized matrices

bad_trace_rho_sigma_y.note: D[L] is trace-preserving even for unnormalized matrices

bad_trace_rho_sigma_z.note: D[L] is trace-preserving even for unnormalized matrices

bad_trace_rho_sigma_minus.note: D[L] is trace-preserving even for unnormalized matrices

bad_trace_rho_sigma_plus.note: D[L] is trace-preserving even for unnormalized matrices

maximally_mixed_sigma_x.note: For Pauli L, D[L](I/2)=0. For sigma_pm, D[L](I/2)!=0.

maximally_mixed_sigma_y.note: For Pauli L, D[L](I/2)=0. For sigma_pm, D[L](I/2)!=0.

maximally_mixed_sigma_z.note: For Pauli L, D[L](I/2)=0. For sigma_pm, D[L](I/2)!=0.

maximally_mixed_sigma_minus.note: For Pauli L, D[L](I/2)=0. For sigma_pm, D[L](I/2)!=0.

maximally_mixed_sigma_plus.note: For Pauli L, D[L](I/2)=0. For sigma_pm, D[L](I/2)!=0.

tiny_coupling.note: D[eps*L] scales as eps^2 (quadratic in L)

summary.scope_note: Local open-system dynamics lego for infinitesimal Lindblad evolution, steady states, and dissipator spectra on bounded carriers.
